flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Olney Central College rose 37% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.8k → $6.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Olney Central College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $5.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Olney Central College rose 179% between 2021 and 2024 (585 → 1.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Olney Central College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
